Vendored browser libraries
==========================

GLTFLoader.js is from the Three.js r128 examples package:

https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.128.0/examples/js/loaders/GLTFLoader.js

Three.js is distributed under the MIT license. This local copy keeps the 3D
piece loader available on shared hosting without depending on another CDN
request during page startup.
